title: Monsoon Moist Australian Almond Skewers
description: A vegan-friendly Australian dish featuring almond paste and ferment-jang, perfect for a monsoon season snack. The combination of grassy and shattering textures creates a unique experience.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together almond paste, ferment-jang, lemon juice, olive oil, paprika, and salt until well combined.
Thread a small amount of the almond paste mixture onto each bamboo skewer, leaving a small space at the top.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake the skewers in the preheated oven for 15 minutes, or until lightly toasted.
Remove the skewers from the oven and sprinkle with chopped parsley and sesame seeds.
Serve the skewers warm, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
Refrigerate any leftovers for up to 3 days.
